title: oreocharis pankaiyuae
intro: Oreocharis pankaiyuae, also known as the Thai orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. It has been traditionally used in Thai medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving headaches, and is also thought to have antioxidant properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and ground into a powder, which can be used to make teas or infusions.
